title: delphinium elbursense var. gymnobotrys
intro: Delphinium elbursense var. gymnobotrys, also known as Persian delphinium or mountain delphinium, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the buttercup family, native to Iran. The medicinal properties of this plant are primarily attributed to its alkaloids, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Delphinium elbursense var. gymnobotrys include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as an anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its availability and usage may be limited due to its rarity.
